methodology.description: Conversion rates use cross-industry averages as baseline for uncategorized businesses

source.title: Conversion Rate by Industry: Updated Benchmarks for 2024
source.snippet: Cross-industry paid traffic conversion rate averages 2.3-2.7%

derivation.notes: Neutral adjustment factor for uncategorized businesses

conv_paid.notes: Recommend selecting specific category if possible for more accurate benchmarks

source.title: Conversion Rate by Industry: Updated Benchmarks for 2024
source.snippet: Cross-industry organic traffic conversion rate averages 2.8-3.2%

derivation.notes: Neutral adjustment factor for uncategorized businesses

conv_organic.notes: Organic typically converts 1.2x better than paid due to higher intent

source.title: Email Marketing Statistics 2024
source.snippet: Email/retention traffic converts at 7-8% on average across ecommerce

derivation.notes: Neutral adjustment factor for uncategorized businesses

conv_retention.notes: Returning customers have 2.5-3x higher conversion than new visitors

source.title: Customer Acquisition Cost Benchmarks by Industry

cac_paid.notes: Median of all categories; recommend selecting specific category

aov_typical.notes: Median of all categories; recommend selecting specific category

source.title: Understanding Margins and Revenue in DTC Ecommerce

gross_margin_typical.notes: Median of all categories; recommend selecting specific category
